description: Plugin-distributed hooks for embedded-iot-firmware. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags embedded firmware anti-patterns (malloc/new in ISR or hot path, blocking delay in ISR, OTA without rollback note, hard-coded key/secret). Set EMBEDDED_IOT_FIRMWARE_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
